settings.text: Real results from real jobs. See the Sparkhaus standard for yourself.

settings.title: Post-Renovation Kitchen
settings.description: Full deep clean after a kitchen remodel. Construction dust, grout haze, and adhesive residue removed from every surface.

settings.title: Downtown Office Suite
settings.description: 5,000 sq ft commercial space. Daily maintenance cleaning with quarterly deep clean schedule for a tech company.

settings.title: Move-Out Apartment
settings.description: Full move-out clean for a 3-bedroom apartment. Client received their full security deposit back.

settings.title: Residential Deep Clean
settings.description: First-time deep clean for a family home. Every room, closet, and appliance interior detailed from top to bottom.

settings.title: Retail Storefront
settings.description: Weekly cleaning for a high-traffic boutique. Floors, displays, fitting rooms, and restrooms kept spotless for customers.

settings.title: Vacation Rental Turnover
settings.description: Same-day turnover cleaning between guests. Linens, kitchen, bathrooms, and common areas reset to hotel standards.

settings.quote: We had them do a post-renovation clean and honestly couldn't believe the result. Every surface gleamed. They even got grout dust out of places we didn't know existed.
settings.name: Tom & Linda R.
settings.title: Post-renovation deep clean

settings.quote: As a property manager, I need reliable turnover cleaning. Sparkhaus handles 12 of my units and they've never missed a deadline or dropped the quality. Five stars across the board.
settings.name: Carla V.
settings.title: Property management client

settings.quote: I've tried four different cleaning companies over the past two years. Sparkhaus is the only one that actually cleans to the standard they promise. They earned a permanent spot on my calendar.
settings.name: Maya L.
settings.title: Weekly residential client

settings.quote: Our dental office needs to be spotless for patients. Sparkhaus handles it nightly and we've had zero complaints from staff or patients. They understand what 'clean' really means in a medical setting.
